suite.name: suite S1779554637765 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Inventory Page Should Be Displayed
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com, enter valid credentials for standard_user, click Login and verify redirection to inventory page.

test.name: TC_002 — Add Product To Cart After Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Fill In Login Form With Valid Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And Inventory Page Should Be Displayed
Verify Inventory Page Is Displayed
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/inventory.html' in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/inventory.html' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.status: Location did not contain '/inventory.html' in 10 seconds.
Location did not contain '/inventory.html' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: When Add First Product To Cart
Then Cart Badge Should Display One Item
And First Product Button Should Be Remove
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: After login with standard_user, click Add to cart on the first product and verify the cart badge shows 1 and the button changes to Remove.
test.status: Location did not contain '/inventory.html' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Locked Out User

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Fill In Login Form With Locked User Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Locked Out Error Message Should Be Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=.error-message-container h3' contains exact text 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: And User Should Stay On Login Page
Verify User Stays On Login Page
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Access saucedemo.com, enter credentials for locked_out_user, click Login and verify the error message and user stays on login page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo — 3 test cases
